headline: Here's Why You Should Retain CF Industries Stock in Your Portfolio
summary: CF benefits from strong global nitrogen demand and higher fertilizer prices, but rising natural gas costs challenge its margin outlook.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on LyondellBasell Industries, Lowers Price Target to $62
summary: Mizuho  analyst John Roberts   maintains LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $76 to $62.
